message.content:
I need to understand the store structure and existing Storybook mocks for building an Extract screen story. Read these files:

1. src/services/store/slices.ts - to understand all available slices
2. .storybook/mocks/store.ts - to understand how the store is mocked
3. .storybook/preview.tsx - to understand decorators
4. .storybook/decorators/PhoneFrameDecorator.tsx - for reference
5. src/services/pointsExtract/ - explore this directory for the extract data model and API
6. Any files related to "extract" in src/services/

Also search for:
- "ExtractRewardProgram" references across the codebase
- "pointsExtract" store slice definition
- "ListCardTransition" usage patterns

Be thorough - I need the full picture of how extract data flows.
